test_cases.title: Skill read increments counter in usage-stats.json
test_cases.description: AC-1: AI reads a skill's SKILL.md → stats file shows count +1 for that skill
steps: Ask AI to read any available skill's SKILL.md file

test_cases.title: Agent call increments counter in usage-stats.json
test_cases.description: AC-2: AI calls subagent tool → stats file shows count +1 for that agent
steps: Delegate a task to a specific agent (e.g., general-purpose)

test_cases.title: Parallel mode agent call counts all agents
test_cases.description: AC-2: subagent parallel mode with multiple agents → each gets counted
steps: Trigger parallel subagent call with 2+ agents
Verify each agent in the parallel call has count >= 1

test_cases.title: Chain mode agent call counts all agents
test_cases.description: AC-2: subagent chain mode → each agent in chain gets counted
steps: Trigger chain subagent call with 2+ agents
Verify each agent in the chain has count >= 1

test_cases.title: Cross-session count accumulation
test_cases.description: AC-3: Two sequential sessions each read same skill → count = 2
steps: Session 1: read a skill file, verify count = 1
Session 2: read same skill file, verify count = 2

test_cases.title: Write failure does not crash Pi
test_cases.description: AC-4: Make stats file unwritable, trigger counting, verify Pi continues

test_cases.title: Usage analyzer skill produces analysis report
test_cases.description: AC-5: Load usage-analyzer skill → agent reads JSON → produces structured report
steps: Verify output contains ranked list + recommendations

test_cases.title: Extension registers no tools or commands
test_cases.description: AC-6: Verify extension is invisible — no new tool or command registered
steps: Check available tools list — no usage-tracker or usage-stats tool

test_cases.title: Extension creates stats file on first use
test_cases.description: When stats file does not exist, extension creates it on first counting event
steps: Start Pi session, trigger skill read
Verify file is created with correct structure

test_cases.title: Extension handles corrupted stats file gracefully
test_cases.description: If stats file contains invalid JSON, extension resets to empty stats and logs error
steps: Start Pi session, trigger counting event
Check stderr for parse error log
